_disclaimer: Featured-player data compiled from football knowledge as of early 2026. Clubs reflect most-recently-known sides and may change with transfer windows. Caps/goals are approximate. Jamaica did NOT qualify for the 2026 World Cup and is intentionally excluded. Groups follow the official FIFA 2026 final draw.
